name: compass
description: A Claude-Code-native reasoning-composition plugin for complex/vague tasks: 13 skills grounded in prompt-engineering techniques from universal-creator (clarify-scope, explore-branches, decompose-chain, reason-verify, ground-evidence, draft-revise, calibrate-format, optimize-instruction, investigate-dynamically, map-relationships, negotiate-tradeoffs, verify-assumptions, summarize-trace), composed by compass-solve into an actual workflow rather than exposed as a technique picker.
